title: Lead Revenue Manager at Celebi India

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Celebi India
jsonLd.description:
We at Celebi India are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Surat. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Celebi India:
Celebi India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Celebi India!
